title: Umea Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Umea, with a Z-Score of -3.57. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Umea are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap has led to a high demand for heating, with 13.5 GG of heating degree days (HDD) recorded. 
 The relative humidity is at 57%, and the wind speed is 16.6 km/h, making the conditions even more challenging.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical cold snap in Umea.
